finding: FILL MODEL: contrarian entry after >=12bps prior move (microstructure family)

reproduction.status: EXACT reproduction from data/ via independent code (regime_attack.py)
reproduction.ledger_fills: n=155; entry p25 .47 p50 .51 p90 .55; share-wtd mean .4861 == claimed

resplits.note: underlying data spans only 3 days (pm) / 32h (ledger), so 'by week' degenerates; used per-UTC-day + thirds
resplits.verdict: core fill quantiles stable within ~1.5c across all folds; availability stable-or-improving; ledger TEST n=52 >= 30

kaufman_regimes.verdict: holds in calm; trending side within ~1c on ledger (n=25) but uncensored trending coverage is n=5 — untested there; directionally availability drops when trending (consistent with the finding's own skip-rate caveat)

window_representativeness.verdict: the 3-day sample window is NOT unusually calm vs 60d history (p95 eff .63 vs .67); a strongly trending stretch is still unobserved directly, but the window is representative

unstable_subclaims.join_ask_2c_below_mid: NOT stable: chronological halves mean -0.049 (n=14) vs -0.009 (n=14); total n=28 < 30. Treat the 'entering fast is ~2-3c cheaper than p20' bonus as 0 to -2c, not -2.9c.
unstable_subclaims.prior_move_size_gradient: REVERSES in third_1 (12-16bps med .565 vs >=16bps .535); only holds in thirds 2-3 with n=7-9. Do not parameterize backtests on the size gradient.

why_not_refuted: Headline effect reproduced exactly. The deliverable is a COST INPUT (fill quantiles + 31% skip rate), not an edge claim, and its core numbers are stable across day/thirds splits, both Kaufman regimes on the ledger side, and TEST n=52 trades >= 30. The finding itself already flags the fragile parts (p20 is mid-ish, reversal edge unresolvable, skips above 55c). Weaknesses found (join drift, size-gradient reversal, thin trending coverage n=5 uncensored) degrade sub-claims by ~1c, not the recipe.
required_amendments: Drop or halve the '-2.9c fast-entry bonus' from the join (unstable, n=28).
Do not use the 12-16 vs >=16bps price gradient as a backtest parameter (unstable across thirds).
Quote availability as 0.69 [0.55, 0.83] and re-estimate before relying on it in a trending regime (uncensored trending n=5).
